query:
SELECT 
  id, name, sector, location, stage, priority, capexGrade, owner, contractors,
  matchedBusinessLines, projectKey, createdAt, sources, equipmentSignals, value
FROM projects
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT 
  id, name, sector, location, stage, priority, capexGrade, owner, contractors,
  matchedBusinessLines, projectKey, createdAt, sources, equipmentSignals, value
FROM projects
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;

rows.name: NT Road Infrastructure Research and Development
rows.owner: NT Government’s Department of Logistics and Infrastructure, Charles Darwin University

rows.name: Renewable Energy Development
rows.equipmentSignals: ["Portable Air (construction, potentially drilling for foundations)", "PAL (generators for site power, lighting towers)", "Pump / Flow (dewatering)", "BESS (potential for hybrid power solutions, microgrids)"]

rows.name: Freeway Upgrade
rows.stage: Procurement advanced, shortlisted teams invited to progress
rows.equipmentSignals: ["Portable Air (construction, tunnelling, shotcrete)", "PAL (lighting towers for night work, generators for site power)", "Pump / Flow (dewatering, stormwater management)"]

rows.name: Defence Air Base Building Refurbishment, WA
Defence Facility Upgrade, Western Sydney
rows.contractors: [{"confidence": 0.8, "detail": "A lead contractor has been selected for the delivery phase.", "name": "Undisclosed", "status": "Selected as lead contractor"}]

rows.name: Regional NSW Health Rehabilitation Facility
rows.contractors: [{"confidence": 0.8, "detail": "A contractor has been appointed to deliver the facility.", "name": "Undisclosed", "status": "Appointed"}]
